settings.heading: Drivers, firmware, and utilities
settings.copy: Find the files you need by product, platform, or the task you are trying to complete.

settings.heading: Downloadable resources by product or task
settings.copy: Browse updates, drivers, and utilities by product family, platform, or support task without digging through an unstructured file list.
settings.source_note: Choose the file that matches your product and platform, then move into compatibility or contact support only if you still need help.

settings.title: Firmware updates
settings.copy: Open firmware files with supported products, platform notes, and version guidance clearly listed.

settings.title: Platform drivers
settings.copy: Download platform-specific drivers with release notes, install guidance, and supported product details in one place.

settings.title: Updater and helper tools
settings.copy: Access companion tools, updater apps, and support utilities tied to EZQuest products and setup workflows.

settings.heading: Not sure which download applies to your setup?
settings.copy: If the right file is still unclear, move into compatibility guidance or contact support before you install anything.
